note: Hand-entered NYC Memorial Day weekend events (May 23-25, 2026). Confirm details on each venue's site before going.

events.title: Brooklyn Memorial Day Parade
events.description: One of the nation's largest Memorial Day parades, stepping off at 11am from 78th Street and Third Avenue, proceeding down Marine Avenue and up Fourth Avenue to John Paul Jones Park for a memorial service with bagpipes, flag raising, wreath laying, and a 21-gun salute.

events.title: Intrepid Museum Fleet Week
events.description: Free public displays on Pier 86 with the U.S. Marine Corps, U.S. Coast Guard, U.S. Air Force, and antique military vehicles. Museum admission applies for indoor exhibits.
events.venue: Intrepid Sea, Air & Space Museum, Pier 86

events.title: Intrepid Museum Fleet Week
events.description: Free public displays on Pier 86 with the armed services and antique military vehicles. Museum admission applies for indoor exhibits.
events.venue: Intrepid Sea, Air & Space Museum, Pier 86

events.title: Intrepid Museum Fleet Week — Memorial Day
events.description: Final day of Fleet Week with Memorial Day programming aboard the Intrepid and on Pier 86.
events.venue: Intrepid Sea, Air & Space Museum, Pier 86

events.title: DanceAfrica — Free Outdoor African Bazaar
events.description: North America's largest festival of African dance and music returns to BAM. The free outdoor African Bazaar features food, vendors, music, and family programming.

events.title: DanceAfrica — Free Outdoor African Bazaar
events.description: Free outdoor African Bazaar at BAM with food, vendors, music, and family programming.
